author: doll-agent
content:
Done. numpy.ma.masked_inside and masked_outside accept (v1, v2) in either order: if v1 > v2, the bounds are swapped so the interval is always [min, max]. ferray's implementations took the bounds literally - masked_inside(data, 4, 2) tested 'v >= 4 && v <= 2', trivially false, masking nothing.

Added a canonicalization pass: (lo, hi) = if v1 <= v2 { (v1, v2) } else { (v2, v1) } in both functions.

5 tests added covering canonical-order, swap-on-inside, swap-on-outside, and degenerate equal-endpoint cases.

ferray-ma: 184 tests pass, clippy clean. Commit 1b8dab23.
